items.title: Backrooms is a certified blockbuster with a $38 million opening day
items.description: The Kane Parsons' film Backrooms is expected to earn up to $90 million in its opening weekend after pulling down $38 million on Friday alone. That's not only above expectations, but absolutely obliterates A24's previous opening weekend record of $25.5 million for Alex Garland's Civil War. It's also ...

items.description: Microsoft is facing criticism for its handling of zero-day exploits. items.title: The Arduboy FX-C is an excellent time killer you might forget you’re carrying

items.title: Pebblebee’s Halo watches my back and my belongings
items.description: I live in a part of Los Angeles where I feel safer bringing pepper spray on walks. The problem is, I don't always remember to bring it with me, and it's not legal to carry it everywhere I go. Pebblebee's $59.99 Halo Bluetooth tracker surprised me by being a suitable replacement because it doubles as...
